---
title: "Map of Ukraine"
author: "Anton Piatachenco"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: true
  message: false
  warning: false
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(maps)
library(ggthemes)
library(palmerpenguins)
library(ggExtra)
library(magick)
library(cowplot)


locations <- data.frame(
  city = c("Uzhhorod", "Vremivka", "Moskva"),
  lon = c(22.2879, 36.8144, 30.5000),
  lat = c(48.6208, 47.8331, 45.1667),
  color = c("red", "darkgreen", "black")
)


ukraine_map_data <- map_data("world", region = "Ukraine")

map_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(data = ukraine_map_data, 
               aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group), 
               fill = "white", color = "#0057B7", linewidth = 1) +
  coord_quickmap() +
  
  geom_point(data = locations, aes(x = lon, y = lat, color = city), size = 3, 
             shape = c(19, 19, 4)) +
  geom_text(data = locations, aes(x = lon, y = lat, label = city),
            vjust = 1.5, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Uzhhorod" = "red", "Vremivka" = "darkgreen", "Moskva" = "black")) +
  ggtitle("Ukrainian Biological Data Science Summer School",
          subtitle = "July 11 – 25, 2026") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


img_url <- "https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcSKfm7ZhcUrxAu13ycI-47X3ETOT6EphjlAMEpyPiGdfA89n8bE7bughm0P&s=10"
download.file(img_url, "meme_temp.png", mode = "wb")
meme_img <- image_read("meme_temp.png")


final_plot <- ggdraw(map_plot) +
  draw_image(meme_img, x = 0.45, y = 0.55, width = 0.15, height = 0.15)

final_plot

# ggsave(final_plot, filename = "../figures/AntonPiatachenco.png")
```
